intention: 提前将信息共享给团队
sentencePatterns: We'd like to share [the new version information] with [the X team] in advance.
Let me share [the updates] with the team in advance so they can prepare.
realLifeExamples: We'd like to share the new version information with the Trend, Mantis, and UDA teams in advance.
I'll share the release notes with the QA team in advance before the deployment.
usageNotes: share ... with is more natural than provide ... to when proactively informing teams; provide is better for formal deliverables.
productionPrompts: 你想提前告诉某个团队一些信息，怎么说？
